title: Trichoneura grandiglumis
taxonomy: Trichoneura grandiglumis is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is commonly classified within the kingdom Plantae and is further divided into several subcategories. More specifically, it is classified as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Monocots, clade - Commelinids, order - Poales, family - Cyperaceae, genus - Trichoneura, species - T. grandiglumis. The classification of Trichoneura grandiglumis is based on its physical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. This classification helps scientists understand the plant's relationships and position within the plant kingdom.
